MS.S: Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Database Migration Service cmdlets for Azure Sql in Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Core._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_For more information on Database Migration Service, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/dms/dms-overview

* General availability for module Az.DataMigration_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded Data Migration API to stable version '2025-06-30'._x000D__x000A_* Added support for retrying database migrations and for deleting SQL VM and SQL MI Database Migration Services._x000D__x000A_* Added cmdlets: 'Invoke-AzDataMigrationRetryToSqlDb', 'Remove-AzDataMigrationToSqlManagedInstance', 'Remove-AzDataMigrationToSqlVM'

Microsoft Azure PowerShell - Database Migration Service cmdlets for Azure Sql in Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Core._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_For more information on Database Migration Service, please visit the following: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/dms/dms-overview

* General availability for module Az.DataMigration_x000D__x000A_* Upgraded Data Migration API to stable version '2025-06-30'._x000D__x000A_* Added support for retrying database migrations and for deleting SQL VM and SQL MI Database Migration Services._x000D__x000A_* Added cmdlets: 'Invoke-AzDataMigrationRetryToSqlDb', 'Remove-AzDataMigrationToSqlManagedInstance', 'Remove-AzDataMigrationToSqlVM'
